{% extends "base.html" %} {% block title %}Cano - Type-safe async workflow engine for Rust{% endblock title %} {% block description %}Cano is a high-performance orchestration engine designed for building resilient, self-healing systems in Rust. Unlike simple task queues, Cano uses Finite State Machines (FSM) to define strict, type-safe transitions between processing steps.{% endblock description %} {% block og_title %}Cano - Type-safe async workflow engine for Rust{% endblock og_title %} {% block og_description %}Type-safe async workflow engine with built-in scheduling, retry logic, and state machine semantics.{% endblock og_description %} {% block content %} {{ section.content | safe }} {% endblock content %}
